title: OpenRouter vs Vercel vs LLMGateway Performance
excerpt: We measured AI gateway performance with an open-source TTFT benchmark: 75 cold + 75 warm interleaved runs of claude-haiku-4.5 against LLM Gateway and OpenRouter, with phase-by-phase timings and raw data published. LLM Gateway reached first token ~35% faster cold and ~34% faster warm, and here is exactly how to reproduce the numbers.
content_html:
Every AI gateway adds a hop between your app and the model. The question that matters is what that hop costs at the moment your user is staring at a blank chat window: the time to first token. Most gateway latency debates skip the measurement and argue architecture — so we measured it.

We ran an open-source TTFT benchmark against LLM Gateway and OpenRouter, interleaved, from the same machine, on the same model. The medians over 75 runs each: LLM Gateway got the first content token in 906ms on a cold connection and 814ms on a warm one. OpenRouter took 1392ms and 1232ms. That is roughly 35% faster cold and 34% faster warm, with zero errors across the 300 measured runs — 450 HTTP requests in total, counting the throwaway warm-up call that precedes each warm measurement, every one of which returned HTTP 200. The raw per-run data is published in full.

How we measured AI gateway performance

We used ai-gateways-benchmark, an open-source script by Ronny Badilla that recently made the rounds comparing Vercel AI Gateway, OpenRouter, and Cloudflare AI Gateway. It is Python stdlib only — raw sockets, no HTTP library — and it times every phase of a streaming request separately: DNS, TCP connect, TLS handshake, TTFB (request sent to first response byte), and TTFT (request sent to first content token in the SSE stream).

That separation is the point. "Gateway latency" claims usually conflate connection cost, edge proximity, and actual routing overhead. This tool splits them apart.

Our setup, on July 22, 2026:

  • Same model on both gateways: claude-haiku-4.5, streaming, max_tokens: 16, identical prompt
  • 75 cold + 75 warm runs per gateway, interleaved round-robin so time-of-day drift hits both equally
  • Cold = a fresh connection paying full DNS + TCP + TLS with a new TLS context (no session resumption)
  • Warm = a second request on an already-open socket — the connection-pool case your production traffic mostly lives in
  • One residential vantage point, zero errors on either gateway across all 450 HTTP requests (including warm-ups)

Results: LLM Gateway vs OpenRouter

Medians of n=75 per cell. Cold TTFT is end-to-end: DNS + TCP + TLS + time to first content token — what a short-lived process pays.

Medians TTFB (cold) TTFT (cold) TTFT (warm)
LLM Gateway 201ms 906ms 814ms
OpenRouter (direct) 1369ms 1392ms 1232ms

The spread, as median with p10–p90 range:

Metric LLM Gateway OpenRouter
Cold TTFB 201 (194–240) 1369 (979–1643)
Cold e2e TTFT 906 (803–1380) 1392 (1002–1675)
Warm TTFB 176 (171–193) 1229 (924–1500)
Warm TTFT 814 (673–1379) 1232 (924–1501)

Two things stand out beyond the medians. LLM Gateway's p90 cold TTFT (1380ms) came in below OpenRouter's median — the slow tail of one distribution beat the middle of the other. And LLM Gateway's warm TTFB barely moves: 171–193ms across the p10–p90 range, which is the stability you want under a production connection pool.

Where the time goes

The phase breakdown shows the overhead is not in the connection:

Gateway DNS TCP TLS TTFB TTFT (request)
LLM Gateway 3.2 20.9 40.2 200.9 829.5
OpenRouter 3.4 7.2 12.7 1369.4 1369.8

OpenRouter's edge actually wins the handshake — 13ms TLS vs our 40ms. It loses everything after the request is sent.

One honest caveat on the TTFB column: it flatters LLM Gateway for an architectural reason. Our gateway starts the response stream in about 200ms, before the first upstream token arrives. OpenRouter holds its first byte until the first token is ready, so its TTFB equals its TTFT on every single run. TTFB tells you who streams headers early; TTFT is the number your users feel, and it is the honest headline of this post.

A second caveat: each gateway ran its default routing for this model. OpenRouter picks its upstream per request (a request we inspected was served via Amazon Bedrock), while our runs were pinned to Anthropic's API. Both are what you get out of the box, but they are different upstreams.

How Vercel AI Gateway compares

We did not benchmark Vercel ourselves. The benchmark's author published his own run of the same script — from his vantage point, on a different date — comparing Vercel AI Gateway, OpenRouter, and Cloudflare AI Gateway proxying OpenRouter:

His run (medians of n=5) TTFB TTFT (cold) TTFT (warm)
Vercel AI Gateway 785ms 1099ms 822ms
OpenRouter (direct) 1100ms 1123ms 986ms
Cloudflare → OpenRouter 1300ms 1420ms 1279ms

These numbers are not directly comparable to ours — different location, different network, different day, n=5 vs n=75. What they are useful for is a sanity check: OpenRouter lands north of a second to first token in his run and in ours, from two different corners of the internet. Against his table, LLM Gateway's 906ms cold and 814ms warm sit at or below the best row — but the only comparison we will state as fact is the one we measured ourselves, interleaved, from one machine.

Location dependence cuts both ways, and the benchmark's README says so explicitly: results are a property of where you measure from, not a global ranking. Which is why the right move is to run it yourself.

Run the benchmark yourself

The whole thing is a config file and two API keys:

It prints per-run lines while it works, then a medians table, and dumps raw per-run JSON with request-id receipts. If you run it from your region and get different numbers — including ones where we lose — we want to see them.

Latency is the tax you pay on every request

A gateway earns its hop with failover, unified billing, and one API across every model it routes. But you pay its latency on every single request, forever. That makes time to first token one of the few gateway properties worth measuring before you commit — and one of the easiest, since the tooling is open source and takes minutes to run.

If you are on OpenRouter today, LLM Gateway speaks the same OpenAI-compatible API — switching means changing the base URL and swapping in an LLM Gateway API key, covered in the OpenRouter migration guide.

Frequently Asked Questions

What is TTFT and why does it matter more than TTFB?

TTFT (time to first token) is the delay between sending a request and receiving the first piece of model output in the stream. TTFB (time to first byte) only measures when the server starts responding — a gateway can stream headers immediately while the model is still silent. For anything a user watches in real time, TTFT is the latency they actually experience.

What is a good TTFT for an AI gateway?

It depends on the model and your distance from the gateway's edge, so compare gateways against each other rather than an absolute bar. In this AI gateway performance benchmark, first tokens from claude-haiku-4.5 arrived in roughly 800–900ms through LLM Gateway and 1200–1400ms through OpenRouter, measured from the same machine in the same session.

Are these results valid from every location?

No — latency benchmarks are a property of the vantage point, and the benchmark's own README is explicit about it. Our numbers come from one residential connection on one day; the author's Vercel numbers come from another. The script is open source and takes minutes to run, so measure from where your servers actually live.

Does LLM Gateway support the same models as OpenRouter?

LLM Gateway routes an overlapping catalogue — the full list is on the models page, spanning the major closed and open-weight providers on the providers page. Requests use the OpenAI-compatible format either way, so moving a workload between the two is a base URL and key change.

Measure it yourself:

  • Try LLM Gateway free — one key, streaming from day one
  • Migrate from OpenRouter — a base URL and API key change
  • What is an LLM gateway? — where the hop pays for itself

blocks.html_en: Every AI gateway adds a hop between your app and the model. The question that matters is what that hop costs at the moment your user is staring at a blank chat window: the time to first token. Most gateway latency debates skip the measurement and argue architecture — so we measured it.

sentences.en: Every AI gateway adds a hop between your app and the model.
sentences.zh: 每个 AI 网关都会在您的应用程序和模型之间添加一个跃点。

sentences.en: The question that matters is what that hop costs at the moment your user is staring at a blank chat window: the time to first token.
sentences.zh: 重要的问题是，当用户盯着空白聊天窗口时，这一跳的成本是多少：获得第一个令牌的时间。

sentences.en: Most gateway latency debates skip the measurement and argue architecture — so we measured it.
sentences.zh: 大多数网关延迟争论都会跳过测量并争论架构 - 因此我们对其进行了测量。

blocks.html_en: We ran an open-source TTFT benchmark against LLM Gateway and OpenRouter, interleaved, from the same machine, on the same model. The medians over 75 runs each: LLM Gateway got the first content token in 906ms on a cold connection and 814ms on a warm one. OpenRouter took 1392ms and 1232ms. That is roughly 35% faster cold and 34% faster warm, with zero errors across the 300 measured runs — 450 HTTP requests in total, counting the throwaway warm-up call that precedes each warm measurement, every one of which returned HTTP 200. The raw per-run data is published in full.

sentences.en: We ran an open-source TTFT benchmark against LLM Gateway and OpenRouter, interleaved, from the same machine, on the same model.
sentences.zh: 我们针对 LLM Gateway 和 OpenRouter 运行了开源 TTFT 基准测试，这些基准测试是在同一台机器上、同一模型上交错进行的。

sentences.en: The medians over 75 runs each: LLM Gateway got the first content token in 906ms on a cold connection and 814ms on a warm one.
sentences.zh: 每个运行的中位数都超过 75：LLM Gateway 在冷连接上用 906 毫秒获得第一个内容令牌，在热连接上用 814 毫秒获得第一个内容令牌。

sentences.en: OpenRouter took 1392ms and 1232ms.
sentences.zh: OpenRouter 花费了 1392ms 和 1232ms。

sentences.en: That is roughly 35% faster cold and 34% faster warm, with zero errors across the 300 measured runs — 450 HTTP requests in total, counting the throwaway warm-up call that precedes each warm measurement, every one of which returned HTTP 200.
sentences.zh: 冷时速度大约快 35%，热时速度快 34%，在 300 次测量运行中零错误 — 总共 450 个 HTTP 请求，算上每次热测量之前的一次性预热调用，每个测量都返回 HTTP 200。

sentences.en: The raw per-run data is published in full.
sentences.zh: 每次运行的原始数据已完整发布。

sentences.en: How we measured AI gateway performance
sentences.zh: 我们如何衡量 AI 网关性能

blocks.html_en: We used ai-gateways-benchmark, an open-source script by Ronny Badilla that recently made the rounds comparing Vercel AI Gateway, OpenRouter, and Cloudflare AI Gateway. It is Python stdlib only — raw sockets, no HTTP library — and it times every phase of a streaming request separately: DNS, TCP connect, TLS handshake, TTFB (request sent to first response byte), and TTFT (request sent to first content token in the SSE stream).

sentences.en: We used ai-gateways-benchmark, an open-source script by Ronny Badilla that recently made the rounds comparing Vercel AI Gateway, OpenRouter, and Cloudflare AI Gateway.
sentences.zh: 我们使用了 ai-gateways-benchmark，这是 Ronny Badilla 的开源脚本，最近对 Vercel AI Gateway、OpenRouter 和 Cloudflare AI Gateway 进行了比较。

sentences.en: It is Python stdlib only — raw sockets, no HTTP library — and it times every phase of a streaming request separately: DNS, TCP connect, TLS handshake, TTFB (request sent to first response byte), and TTFT (request sent to first content token in the SSE stream).
sentences.zh: 它只是 Python stdlib - 原始套接字，没有 HTTP 库 - 并且它分别对流请求的每个阶段进行计时：DNS、TCP 连接、TLS 握手、TTFB（发送到第一个响应字节的请求）和 TTFT（发送到 SSE 流中的第一个内容令牌的请求）。

blocks.html_en: That separation is the point. "Gateway latency" claims usually conflate connection cost, edge proximity, and actual routing overhead. This tool splits them apart.

sentences.en: That separation is the point.
sentences.zh: 分离才是重点。

sentences.en: "Gateway latency" claims usually conflate connection cost, edge proximity, and actual routing overhead.
sentences.zh: “网关延迟”声明通常将连接成本、边缘邻近度和实际路由开销混为一谈。

sentences.en: This tool splits them apart.
sentences.zh: 这个工具将它们分开。

sentences.en: Our setup, on July 22, 2026:
sentences.zh: 我们的设置，2026 年 7 月 22 日：

blocks.html_en: • Cold = a fresh connection paying full DNS + TCP + TLS with a new TLS context (no session resumption)

blocks.html_en: • Warm = a second request on an already-open socket — the connection-pool case your production traffic mostly lives in

sentences.zh: Warm = 对已经打开的套接字的第二个请求 - 您的生产流量主要存在于的连接池情况

sentences.zh: OpenRouter 根据请求选择其上游（我们检查的请求是通过 Amazon Bedrock 提供的），而我们的运行则固定到 Anthropic 的 API。

sentences.en: Both are what you get out of the box, but they are different upstreams.
sentences.zh: 两者都是开箱即用的，但它们的上游不同。

sentences.en: How Vercel AI Gateway compares
sentences.zh: Vercel AI 网关如何比较

blocks.html_en: We did not benchmark Vercel ourselves. The benchmark's author published his own run of the same script — from his vantage point, on a different date — comparing Vercel AI Gateway, OpenRouter, and Cloudflare AI Gateway proxying OpenRouter:

sentences.en: We did not benchmark Vercel ourselves.
sentences.zh: 我们自己没有对 Vercel 进行基准测试。

sentences.en: The benchmark's author published his own run of the same script — from his vantage point, on a different date — comparing Vercel AI Gateway, OpenRouter, and Cloudflare AI Gateway proxying OpenRouter:
sentences.zh: 该基准测试的作者在不同的日期从他的有利位置发布了自己运行的相同脚本，比较了 Vercel AI Gateway、OpenRouter 和代理 OpenRouter 的 Cloudflare AI Gateway：

sentences.en: His run (medians of n=5)
sentences.zh: 他的跑动（n=5 的中位数）

sentences.en: TTFT (cold)
sentences.zh: TTFT（冷）

sentences.en: TTFT (warm)
sentences.zh: TTFT（暖色）

sentences.en: Vercel AI Gateway
sentences.zh: Vercel人工智能网关

sentences.en: OpenRouter (direct)
sentences.zh: OpenRouter（直接）

sentences.en: Cloudflare → OpenRouter

blocks.html_en: These numbers are not directly comparable to ours — different location, different network, different day, n=5 vs n=75. What they are useful for is a sanity check: OpenRouter lands north of a second to first token in his run and in ours, from two different corners of the internet. Against his table, LLM Gateway's 906ms cold and 814ms warm sit at or below the best row — but the only comparison we will state as fact is the one we measured ourselves, interleaved, from one machine.

sentences.en: These numbers are not directly comparable to ours — different location, different network, different day, n=5 vs n=75.
sentences.zh: 这些数字不能与我们的直接比较——不同的位置、不同的网络、不同的日期，n=5 与 n=75。

sentences.en: What they are useful for is a sanity check: OpenRouter lands north of a second to first token in his run and in ours, from two different corners of the internet.
sentences.zh: 它们的用途是进行健全性检查：OpenRouter 从互联网的两个不同角落降落在他运行的和我们运行中的第二个到第一个令牌的北部。

sentences.en: Against his table, LLM Gateway's 906ms cold and 814ms warm sit at or below the best row — but the only comparison we will state as fact is the one we measured ourselves, interleaved, from one machine.
sentences.zh: 与他的桌子相比，LLM Gateway 的 906 毫秒冷时间和 814 毫秒热时间位于最佳行或低于最佳行 - 但我们将作为事实陈述的唯一比较是我们自己从一台机器上交错测量的比较。

blocks.html_en: Location dependence cuts both ways, and the benchmark's README says so explicitly: results are a property of where you measure from, not a global ranking. Which is why the right move is to run it yourself.

sentences.en: Location dependence cuts both ways, and the benchmark's README says so explicitly: results are a property of where you measure from, not a global ranking.
sentences.zh: 位置依赖性是双向的，基准测试的自述文件明确指出：结果是您测量位置的属性，而不是全球排名。

sentences.en: Which is why the right move is to run it yourself.
sentences.zh: 这就是为什么正确的做法是自己运行。

sentences.en: Run the benchmark yourself
sentences.zh: 自己运行基准测试

blocks.html_en: The whole thing is a config file and two API keys:

sentences.en: The whole thing is a config file and two API keys:
sentences.zh: 整个内容就是一个配置文件和两个 API 密钥：

blocks.html_en: It prints per-run lines while it works, then a medians table, and dumps raw per-run JSON with request-id receipts. If you run it from your region and get different numbers — including ones where we lose — we want to see them.

sentences.en: It prints per-run lines while it works, then a medians table, and dumps raw per-run JSON with request-id receipts.
sentences.zh: 它在工作时打印每次运行的行，然后打印中位数表，并转储带有请求 ID 收据的原始每次运行 JSON。

sentences.en: If you run it from your region and get different numbers — including ones where we lose — we want to see them.
sentences.zh: 如果你在你所在的地区运行它并得到不同的数字——包括我们输掉的数字——我们希望看到它们。

blocks.html_en: Latency is the tax you pay on every request

sentences.en: Latency is the tax you pay on every request
sentences.zh: 延迟是您为每个请求支付的税

blocks.html_en: A gateway earns its hop with failover, unified billing, and one API across every model it routes. But you pay its latency on every single request, forever. That makes time to first token one of the few gateway properties worth measuring before you commit — and one of the easiest, since the tooling is open source and takes minutes to run.

sentences.en: A gateway earns its hop with failover, unified billing, and one API across every model it routes.
sentences.zh: 网关通过故障转移、统一计费以及跨其路由的每个模型的一个 API 来赢得一跳。

sentences.en: But you pay its latency on every single request, forever.
sentences.zh: 但你会永远为每个请求付出延迟的代价。

sentences.en: That makes time to first token one of the few gateway properties worth measuring before you commit — and one of the easiest, since the tooling is open source and takes minutes to run.
sentences.zh: 这使得首次令牌时间成为在提交之前值得测量的少数网关属性之一，也是最简单的属性之一，因为该工具是开源的并且需要几分钟才能运行。

blocks.html_en: If you are on OpenRouter today, LLM Gateway speaks the same OpenAI-compatible API — switching means changing the base URL and swapping in an LLM Gateway API key, covered in the OpenRouter migration guide.

sentences.en: If you are on OpenRouter today, LLM Gateway speaks the same OpenAI-compatible API — switching means changing the base URL and swapping in an LLM Gateway API key, covered in the OpenRouter migration guide.
sentences.zh: 如果您现在使用 OpenRouter，LLM Gateway 使用相同的 OpenAI 兼容 API — 切换意味着更改基本 URL 并交换 LLM Gateway API 密钥，这在 OpenRouter 迁移指南中有所介绍。

sentences.en: Frequently Asked Questions
sentences.zh: 常见问题解答

blocks.html_en: What is TTFT and why does it matter more than TTFB?

sentences.en: What is TTFT and why does it matter more than TTFB?
sentences.zh: 什么是 TTFT？为什么它比 TTFB 更重要？

blocks.html_en: TTFT (time to first token) is the delay between sending a request and receiving the first piece of model output in the stream. TTFB (time to first byte) only measures when the server starts responding — a gateway can stream headers immediately while the model is still silent. For anything a user watches in real time, TTFT is the latency they actually experience.

sentences.en: TTFT (time to first token) is the delay between sending a request and receiving the first piece of model output in the stream.
sentences.zh: TTFT（第一个令牌的时间）是发送请求和接收流中第一个模型输出之间的延迟。

sentences.en: TTFB (time to first byte) only measures when the server starts responding — a gateway can stream headers immediately while the model is still silent.
sentences.zh: TTFB（第一个字节的时间）仅测量服务器何时开始响应 - 网关可以在模型仍处于静默状态时立即流式传输标头。

sentences.en: For anything a user watches in real time, TTFT is the latency they actually experience.
sentences.zh: 对于用户实时观看的任何内容，TTFT 是他们实际经历的延迟。

blocks.html_en: What is a good TTFT for an AI gateway?

sentences.en: What is a good TTFT for an AI gateway?
sentences.zh: 对于 AI 网关来说，什么是好的 TTFT？

blocks.html_en: It depends on the model and your distance from the gateway's edge, so compare gateways against each other rather than an absolute bar. In this AI gateway performance benchmark, first tokens from claude-haiku-4.5 arrived in roughly 800–900ms through LLM Gateway and 1200–1400ms through OpenRouter, measured from the same machine in the same session.

sentences.en: It depends on the model and your distance from the gateway's edge, so compare gateways against each other rather than an absolute bar.
sentences.zh: 这取决于型号以及您与网关边缘的距离，因此请将网关相互比较，而不是绝对栏。

sentences.en: In this AI gateway performance benchmark, first tokens from claude-haiku-4.5 arrived in roughly 800–900ms through LLM Gateway and 1200–1400ms through OpenRouter, measured from the same machine in the same session.
sentences.zh: 在此 AI 网关性能基准测试中，来自 claude-haiku-4.5 的第一批令牌通过 LLM Gateway 到达的时间大约为 800-900 毫秒，通过 OpenRouter 到达的时间为 1200-1400 毫秒，这是在同一会话中的同一台机器上测量的。

blocks.html_en: Are these results valid from every location?

sentences.en: Are these results valid from every location?
sentences.zh: 这些结果在每个位置都有效吗？

blocks.html_en: No — latency benchmarks are a property of the vantage point, and the benchmark's own README is explicit about it. Our numbers come from one residential connection on one day; the author's Vercel numbers come from another. The script is open source and takes minutes to run, so measure from where your servers actually live.

sentences.en: No — latency benchmarks are a property of the vantage point, and the benchmark's own README is explicit about it.
sentences.zh: 不——延迟基准测试是有利位置的一个属性，基准测试自己的自述文件对此有明确的说明。

sentences.en: Our numbers come from one residential connection on one day; the author's Vercel numbers come from another.
sentences.zh: 我们的数据来自某一天的一个住宅连接；作者的 Vercel 数字来自另一个。

sentences.en: The script is open source and takes minutes to run, so measure from where your servers actually live.
sentences.zh: 该脚本是开源的，需要几分钟才能运行，因此请从服务器实际所在的位置进行测量。

blocks.html_en: Does LLM Gateway support the same models as OpenRouter?

sentences.en: Does LLM Gateway support the same models as OpenRouter?
sentences.zh: LLM Gateway 支持与 OpenRouter 相同的型号吗？

blocks.html_en: LLM Gateway routes an overlapping catalogue — the full list is on the models page, spanning the major closed and open-weight providers on the providers page. Requests use the OpenAI-compatible format either way, so moving a workload between the two is a base URL and key change.

sentences.en: LLM Gateway routes an overlapping catalogue — the full list is on the models page, spanning the major closed and open-weight providers on the providers page.
sentences.zh: LLM Gateway 路由重叠的目录 - 完整列表位于模型页面上，涵盖提供商页面上的主要封闭式和开放式权重提供商。

sentences.en: Requests use the OpenAI-compatible format either way, so moving a workload between the two is a base URL and key change.
sentences.zh: 无论哪种方式，请求都使用 OpenAI 兼容格式，因此在两者之间移动工作负载是基本 URL 和密钥更改。

sentences.en: Measure it yourself:
sentences.zh: 自己测量一下：

blocks.html_en: • Try LLM Gateway free — one key, streaming from day one

sentences.en: Try LLM Gateway free — one key, streaming from day one
sentences.zh: 免费试用 LLM Gateway — 一键，从第一天开始流式传输

blocks.html_en: • Migrate from OpenRouter — a base URL and API key change

sentences.en: Migrate from OpenRouter — a base URL and API key change
sentences.zh: 从 OpenRouter 迁移 — 基本 URL 和 API 密钥更改

blocks.html_en: • What is an LLM gateway? — where the hop pays for itself

sentences.en: What is an LLM gateway? — where the hop pays for itself
sentences.zh: 什么是LLM网关？ — 啤酒花本身就能收回成本

content_html_zh:
每个 AI 网关都会在您的应用程序和模型之间添加一个跃点。 重要的问题是，当用户盯着空白聊天窗口时，这一跳的成本是多少：获得第一个令牌的时间。 大多数网关延迟争论都会跳过测量并争论架构 - 因此我们对其进行了测量。

我们针对 LLM Gateway 和 OpenRouter 运行了开源 TTFT 基准测试，这些基准测试是在同一台机器上、同一模型上交错进行的。 每个运行的中位数都超过 75：LLM Gateway 在冷连接上用 906 毫秒获得第一个内容令牌，在热连接上用 814 毫秒获得第一个内容令牌。 OpenRouter 花费了 1392ms 和 1232ms。 冷时速度大约快 35%，热时速度快 34%，在 300 次测量运行中零错误 — 总共 450 个 HTTP 请求，算上每次热测量之前的一次性预热调用，每个测量都返回 HTTP 200。 每次运行的原始数据已完整发布。

我们如何衡量 AI 网关性能

我们使用了 ai-gateways-benchmark，这是 Ronny Badilla 的开源脚本，最近对 Vercel AI Gateway、OpenRouter 和 Cloudflare AI Gateway 进行了比较。 它只是 Python stdlib - 原始套接字，没有 HTTP 库 - 并且它分别对流请求的每个阶段进行计时：DNS、TCP 连接、TLS 握手、TTFB（发送到第一个响应字节的请求）和 TTFT（发送到 SSE 流中的第一个内容令牌的请求）。

分离才是重点。 “网关延迟”声明通常将连接成本、边缘邻近度和实际路由开销混为一谈。 这个工具将它们分开。

我们的设置，2026 年 7 月 22 日：

  • 两个网关上的模型相同：claude-haiku-4.5，流式传输，max_tokens：16，相同的提示
  • 每个网关 75 次冷跑 + 75 次热跑，交错循环赛，因此一天中的时间漂移​​对两者的影响相同
  • 冷 = 使用新的 TLS 上下文支付完整 DNS + TCP + TLS 费用的新连接（无会话恢复）
  • Warm = 对已经打开的套接字的第二个请求 - 您的生产流量主要存在于的连接池情况
  • 一个住宅有利位置，任一网关在所有 450 个 HTTP 请求（包括预热）中均为零错误

结果：LLM Gateway 与 OpenRouter

每个细胞的中位数 n=75。 Cold TTFT 是端到端的：DNS + TCP + TLS + 第一个内容令牌的时间 - 这是一个短暂的过程所付出的代价。

中位数TTFB（冷）TTFT（冷）TTFT（暖色）
法学硕士网关 201ms 906ms 814ms
OpenRouter（直接） 1369ms 1392ms 1232ms

价差，作为 p10-p90 范围的中值：

公制法学硕士网关开放路由器
冷TTFB 201 (194–240) 1369 (979–1643)
冷端到端 TTFT 906 (803–1380) 1392 (1002–1675)
温暖的TTFB 176 (171–193) 1229 (924–1500)
温暖的TFT 814 (673–1379) 1232 (924–1501)

有两件事超出了中位数。 LLM Gateway 的 p90 冷 TTFT（1380 毫秒）低于 OpenRouter 的中位数——一个分布的慢尾击败了另一个分布的中间。 LLM Gateway 的热 TTFB 几乎没有移动：在 p10-p90 范围内为 171-193 毫秒，这是生产连接池下您想要的稳定性。

时间都去哪儿了

阶段分解显示开销不在连接中：

网关 DNS TCP TLS TTFB TTFT（请求）
法学硕士网关 3.2 20.9 40.2 200.9 829.5
开放路由器 3.4 7.2 12.7 1369.4 1369.8

OpenRouter 的优势实际上赢得了握手 — 13 毫秒 TLS，而我们的 40 毫秒。 发送请求后，它会丢失所有内容。

关于 TTFB 专栏的一个诚实的警告：它出于架构原因而奉承 LLM Gateway。 在第一个上游令牌到达之前，我们的网关在大约 200 毫秒内启动响应流。 OpenRouter 保留其第一个字节，直到第一个令牌准备就绪，因此每次运行时其 TTFB 等于其 TTFT。 TTFB 告诉您谁先传输标头； TTFT 是用户感受到的数字，也是这篇文章的诚实标题。

第二个警告：每个网关都为此模型运行其默认路由。 OpenRouter 根据请求选择其上游（我们检查的请求是通过 Amazon Bedrock 提供的），而我们的运行则固定到 Anthropic 的 API。 两者都是开箱即用的，但它们的上游不同。

Vercel AI 网关如何比较

我们自己没有对 Vercel 进行基准测试。 该基准测试的作者在不同的日期从他的有利位置发布了自己运行的相同脚本，比较了 Vercel AI Gateway、OpenRouter 和代理 OpenRouter 的 Cloudflare AI Gateway：

他的跑动（n=5 的中位数） TTFB TTFT（冷）TTFT（暖色）
Vercel人工智能网关 785ms 1099ms 822ms
OpenRouter（直接） 1100ms 1123ms 986ms
Cloudflare → OpenRouter 1300ms 1420ms 1279ms

这些数字不能与我们的直接比较——不同的位置、不同的网络、不同的日期，n=5 与 n=75。 它们的用途是进行健全性检查：OpenRouter 从互联网的两个不同角落降落在他运行的和我们运行中的第二个到第一个令牌的北部。 与他的桌子相比，LLM Gateway 的 906 毫秒冷时间和 814 毫秒热时间位于最佳行或低于最佳行 - 但我们将作为事实陈述的唯一比较是我们自己从一台机器上交错测量的比较。

位置依赖性是双向的，基准测试的自述文件明确指出：结果是您测量位置的属性，而不是全球排名。 这就是为什么正确的做法是自己运行。

自己运行基准测试

整个内容就是一个配置文件和两个 API 密钥：

它在工作时打印每次运行的行，然后打印中位数表，并转储带有请求 ID 收据的原始每次运行 JSON。 如果你在你所在的地区运行它并得到不同的数字——包括我们输掉的数字——我们希望看到它们。

延迟是您为每个请求支付的税

网关通过故障转移、统一计费以及跨其路由的每个模型的一个 API 来赢得一跳。 但你会永远为每个请求付出延迟的代价。 这使得首次令牌时间成为在提交之前值得测量的少数网关属性之一，也是最简单的属性之一，因为该工具是开源的并且需要几分钟才能运行。

如果您现在使用 OpenRouter，LLM Gateway 使用相同的 OpenAI 兼容 API — 切换意味着更改基本 URL 并交换 LLM Gateway API 密钥，这在 OpenRouter 迁移指南中有所介绍。

常见问题解答

什么是 TTFT？为什么它比 TTFB 更重要？

TTFT（第一个令牌的时间）是发送请求和接收流中第一个模型输出之间的延迟。 TTFB（第一个字节的时间）仅测量服务器何时开始响应 - 网关可以在模型仍处于静默状态时立即流式传输标头。 对于用户实时观看的任何内容，TTFT 是他们实际经历的延迟。

对于 AI 网关来说，什么是好的 TTFT？

这取决于型号以及您与网关边缘的距离，因此请将网关相互比较，而不是绝对栏。 在此 AI 网关性能基准测试中，来自 claude-haiku-4.5 的第一批令牌通过 LLM Gateway 到达的时间大约为 800-900 毫秒，通过 OpenRouter 到达的时间为 1200-1400 毫秒，这是在同一会话中的同一台机器上测量的。

这些结果在每个位置都有效吗？

不——延迟基准测试是有利位置的一个属性，基准测试自己的自述文件对此有明确的说明。 我们的数据来自某一天的一个住宅连接；作者的 Vercel 数字来自另一个。 该脚本是开源的，需要几分钟才能运行，因此请从服务器实际所在的位置进行测量。

LLM Gateway 支持与 OpenRouter 相同的型号吗？

LLM Gateway 路由重叠的目录 - 完整列表位于模型页面上，涵盖提供商页面上的主要封闭式和开放式权重提供商。 无论哪种方式，请求都使用 OpenAI 兼容格式，因此在两者之间移动工作负载是基本 URL 和密钥更改。

自己测量一下：

  • 免费试用 LLM Gateway — 一键，从第一天开始流式传输
  • 从 OpenRouter 迁移 — 基本 URL 和 API 密钥更改
  • 什么是LLM网关？ — 啤酒花本身就能收回成本
